title: scorzonera tau-saghyz subsp. tautaryensis
intro: Scorzonera tau-saghyz subsp. tautaryensis, also known as the Tautary root or Turkestan daikon, is a subspecies of the Scorzonera tau-saghyz plant, which is a type of root vegetable. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which make it useful in treating various health issues such as arthritis, diabetes, and cardiovascular diseases. The health benefits of Scorzonera tau-saghyz subsp. tautaryensis include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, reduce blood pressure, and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots are often dried and used as a powder or tea, and it can also be used in soups, stews, and other dishes to add flavor and nutrition.
